label: Transparent pinecone motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a pinecone, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A mature pinecone with accurate layered spiral scales, umber brown scale faces, darker forest shadow gaps, pine green needle fragments if naturally attached, resin amber highlights, crisp dry texture, and botanical realism.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the cone.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves scale structure, wood grain, and resin detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest background, no pile of cones, no holiday decoration, no snow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Pinecone" derived from the visible transparent pinecone cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the umber scales, pine green support tones, resin amber highlights, and conifer forest shadows in the visible pinecone cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pinecone, Pinecone Scales, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and multilingual examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show planning and workflow UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style planning design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, warm parchment surfaces, nested scale dividers, subtle conifer texture, layered workflow hierarchy.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: umber brown, pine green, resin amber, scale fiber, forest floor, cone taupe, and forest ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pinecone".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Pinecone design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: This dark design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme together with the light board. Use the visible transparent pinecone cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Pinecone board as references. Preserve the scale palette roles, layered planning component language, cone-spiral dividers, conifer texture, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pinecone, Pinecone Scales, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from forest ink and forest floor, readable text from pine parchment, primary accents from umber scale, navigation and status from pine needle, focus from resin amber, subtle pinecone scale overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and multilingual examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pinecone".
